summary: Iteration 24: All critical bug fixes verified - Login, Premium status, Admin panel, Goals endpoint all working correctly

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 401 without auth token
Returns 200 with defaults instead of 401 - may be by design

verified_fixes.bug_1_premium_status: VERIFIED - Premium status shows 'Active' after login on settings page
verified_fixes.bug_2_admin_panel: VERIFIED - Admin panel loads user list correctly, no black screen or Modal error
verified_fixes.bug_3_goals_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/user/goals returns 200 with data, POST works to set goals
verified_fixes.bug_4_admin_button_hidden: Admin Panel button visible in Settings for admin users (admin@test.com)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bugs from iteration 23 have been fixed and verified. Login flow works, premium status displays correctly, admin panel opens without error and shows user list, goals endpoint functional. Minor edge case: /api/user/goals returns 500 without auth instead of 401.

test_results.login_flow: PASS - Login with admin@test.com/admin123 works, returns session token
test_results.premium_status_api: PASS - Returns is_premium:true, plan:lifetime for admin user
test_results.goals_set: PASS - Can set eggs_per_month and profit_target
test_results.home_page_apis: PASS - coop, statistics/today, statistics/summary, insights, weather, daily-chores all return 200

ui_verification.home_page: VERIFIED - Shows stats cards (Hens, Eggs today), Chores section, Quick Actions, Monthly summary, Weather widget
ui_verification.settings_page: VERIFIED - Shows Premium Active, Goals section, Appearance options, Reminders, Admin Panel button
ui_verification.admin_panel: VERIFIED - Shows tabs (Användare, Premium, Feedback, Community), User list with edit/delete actions
